project.description: Builds and deploys the main application to production Kubernetes cluster.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
echo "=== Step 1: Build Docker image ===" sudo docker build -t acmecorp/main-app:${BUILD_NUMBER} . sudo docker tag acmecorp/main-app:${BUILD_NUMBER} acmecorp/main-app:latest
echo "=== Step 2: Push to registry ===" # Hardcoded AWS credentials for ECR push AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE \ AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYSECRETKEY \ AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-east-1 \ aws ecr get-login-password | sudo docker login --username AWS --password-stdin 123456789.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
sudo docker push 123456789.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/main-app:${BUILD_NUMBER}
echo "=== Step 3: Deploy to production ===" # Same job, same credentials, deploys directly to prod sudo kubectl apply -f k8s/deployment.yaml --namespace production sudo kubectl set image deployment/main-app \ main-app=123456789.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/main-app:${BUILD_NUMBER} \ --namespace production
echo "=== Step 4: Sync build artifacts to S3 ===" AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE \ AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYSECRETKEY \ aws s3 sync ./dist s3://acmecorp-prod-builds/${BUILD_NUMBER}/
echo "Build ${BUILD_NUMBER} deployed to production successfully."
